title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and up to date
scenario: Verify that the "i" icon is visible on the Device Home Screen for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support.
steps: Observe the displayed elements: Device Name, green dot with 'Connected' label, device image, quick settings (if enabled), '...' button, battery icons, and version number.
Check if the device is unencrypted or has limited support.
If the device is unencrypted or has limited support, verify that an 'i' icon is visible next to the Device Name.
If the device is fully encrypted and supported, verify that no 'i' icon is displayed.
expected: The 'i' icon is visible next to the Device Name for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support. The Device Home Screen displays all specified elements correctly.
